summary.title: World Cup 2026 API
summary.description:
The proposed project has a clear goal: to de-oldify antique Football World Cup images. This project assumes that antique images have the following characteristics:
No color, meaning black-and-white images. Approx. images before 1870
Film grain / noise
Low resolution

Taking this into account, the de-oldification process aims to replace those characteristics with modern image-like features:
Colorful
Little to no noise
High resolution

detail.reviewer: Telmo Rubio, Oier Fernandez, Cristina Oueghlani, Aimar Nebreda and Mauricio Luna
